no: Magic Battles Revised v1.9.4 by Subtledoctor. Overhauls spell deflection, breach, dispel mechanics. Configurable via MBR_settings.ini. Detects and adapts to SCS (cn:6000), Spell Revisions, and Tome and Blood (cn:40). Installs LAST in Tactical — uses MOD_IS_INSTALLED checks to detect SCS/SR/TnB.

conflicts.reason: Real conflict — silent spell state failure. MBR cn:10 creates new spell resources (spwi318c, spwi618c, spwi522c) for deflection spells with modified protection levels. EPS cn:14/15 adds opcode 328 (spell state) to VANILLA spell resources (spwi318, spwi522, spwi701) for AI CheckSpellState() detection. MBR's new spell copies don't receive EPS's spell states. Result: EPS pre-buffing AI can't detect active deflections, wastes spell slots re-buffing protected allies. Neither detects the other. Both (MBR cn:10, EPS cn:15). Recommendation: remove MBR cn:10 .
conflicts.source: MBR MBR.tpa lines 243/297/356 COPY to spwi*c.spl; EPS initialize.tpa lines 744-785 adds opcode 328 to vanilla resources; no cross-detection, 2026-04

sum: Streamlines mage spell battles by revising deflection, breach, and dispel mechanics. Configurable, with cross-mod detection for SR/SCS/TnB.

co.no: Revises spell deflection levels, breach behavior, dispel mechanics, and globe interactions. Has built-in SR, SCS, and TnB detection.
